Azure Pipelines:
There may be pipelines that require an authorized user to comment /azp run to run.

Phase 1 hardware validation is complete.

- Validated the combined #121 + #120 CI-built relay artifact on physical dual-ToR and single-ToR/m0 testbeds.
- `test_dhcp_relay_default` and `test_dhcp_relay_unicast_mac` passed for both ISC and SONiC relay agents.
- `test_dhcp_relay_default[sonic-relay-agent]` passed 5 consecutive runs on each testbed.
- The original DUT binaries were restored after validation.

Note: dual-ToR validation exposed a pre-existing sonic-mgmt cleanup issue from #24403: cleanup expected the SONiC relay on the standby ToR even though only the selected ToR is switched. The packet tests passed; a validation-only cleanup correction was used for the consecutive runs. This issue is outside this PR.
/azp run

Phase 1 hardware validation is complete.

- Validated the combined #121 + #120 CI-built relay artifact on physical dual-ToR and single-ToR/m0 testbeds.
- `test_dhcp_relay_default` and `test_dhcp_relay_unicast_mac` passed for both ISC and SONiC relay agents.
- `test_dhcp_relay_default[sonic-relay-agent]` passed 5 consecutive runs on each testbed.
- The original DUT binaries were restored after validation.

Note: dual-ToR validation exposed a pre-existing sonic-mgmt cleanup issue from #24403: cleanup expected the SONiC relay on the standby ToR even though only the selected ToR is switched. The packet tests passed; a validation-only cleanup correction was used for the consecutive runs. This issue is outside this PR.
